headline: How The Chipotle Mexican Grill (CMG) Story Is Shifting As Analyst Views Diverge
summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill’s fair value estimate has been adjusted slightly lower to US$43.40 from US$43.66, a move of about 0.6% that signals a subtle reset in expectations. This change sits alongside a split analyst backdrop, where some firms are lifting targets on the back of potential sales improvement while others trim theirs as they reassess how much upside is already priced in. As you read on, you will see how these shifting price targets feed into the evolving story around Chipotle’s risk...
